questions: Were all 10 implementation steps from the plan completed successfully?
Do all quality gates pass for the new code?
Is the feature fully functional as described in the ticket?

answers.answer: Yes. All 10 steps were completed: schema definition, migration generation, Zod validation, i18n strings (en + fr), API route (GET/POST/DELETE), RemoveFavoriteButton, FavoriteRestaurantForm, FavoriteRestaurantList, favorites page, and dashboard nav link.
evidence: migrations/0001_motionless_puma.sql generated with CREATE TABLE favorite_restaurant
src/locales/en.json and src/locales/fr.json updated with 5 new namespaces
src/app/[locale]/api/favorite-restaurants/route.ts created with GET, POST, DELETE handlers

answers.answer: Yes, for new code. lint (formatting + linting), check:types, check:i18n, check:deps all pass for the new files. Pre-existing errors (13 image import TS2307 in Sponsors.tsx and marketing pages) are unrelated to this change.
evidence: npm run check:i18n: 'No missing keys found! No unused keys found!'
npm run lint: 0 warnings, 13 errors — all 13 are pre-existing TS2307 image import errors in files not touched by this PR
npm run check:deps: exits with code 0
npm run build-local: successful build showing new routes /[locale]/api/favorite-restaurants and /[locale]/dashboard/favorite-restaurants

answers.answer: The feature code is complete and structurally correct. Full runtime verification is blocked by missing Clerk environment variables (CLERK_SECRET_KEY, NEXT_PUBLIC_CLERK_PUBLISHABLE_KEY) which are not provided in the dev setup config. The production build succeeds, confirming all code compiles and routes resolve correctly.
evidence: npm run build-local: exit code 0 with both new routes visible in build output
No dev setup config provided for Clerk credentials

statement: Implementation of the changeable favorite restaurants list feature is complete. All 10 plan steps were executed: Drizzle schema, migration, Zod validation, i18n (en + fr), API route (GET/POST/DELETE with auth), 3 UI components (form, list, remove button), page, and dashboard nav link. Quality gates pass for new code. Production build succeeds. Browser/API runtime verification is blocked by missing Clerk environment variables.
